mapper.delete:
delete from cm_knowledge_unit_kwa where unitid=#{unitid} and kwaid in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select distinct pid from cm_knowledge_unit where id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from cm_knowledge_unit_kwa where unitid in
#{id}

delete from cm_knowledge_unit where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update cm_knowledge_unit set ordernum=#{newOrdernum} where id=#{id}
